mapper.select: SELECT club_code, io_type, trade_type, trade_time, subject, amount, remark FROM tb_club WHERE year = #{year} ORDER BY club_code, io_type DESC, trade_type, trade_time;

SELECT t.club_code, CASE t.club_code WHEN 'HZ_BSK' THEN '杭州-篮球' WHEN 'WZ_BSK' THEN '温州-篮球' WHEN 'HZ_BDM' THEN '杭州-羽毛球' WHEN 'SX_BDM' THEN '绍兴-羽毛球' WHEN 'DEP2_BDM' THEN '营业部2-羽毛球' WHEN 'HZ_HIK' THEN '杭州-毅行' WHEN 'HZ_TJ' THEN '杭州-太极' WHEN 'SX_RUN' THEN '绍兴-跑步' WHEN 'BR_RUN' THEN '分行-向上跑' WHEN 'BR_DNC' THEN '分行-旗舞' ELSE '未知俱乐部' END AS club_name, -- 会费分组总金额：历年结余 + 当年会费收入 SUM(IF(t.io_type = 1 AND t.trade_type IN ('历年结余','会费'), t.amount, 0)) AS incomeFeeSum, -- 收入经费合计（经费、奖励） SUM(IF(t.io_type = 1 AND t.trade_type IN ('经费','奖励'), t.amount, 0)) AS incomeFundSum, -- 总收入小计 SUM(IF(t.io_type = 1, t.amount, 0)) AS incomeTotal, -- 支出-会费合计 SUM(IF(t.io_type = 2 AND t.trade_type = '会费', t.amount, 0)) AS outFeeSum, -- 支出经费全部流水合计（场地+文体活动，前端展示明细用） SUM(IF(t.io_type = 2 AND t.trade_type = '经费', t.amount, 0)) AS outFundSum, -- 单独场地费总额（科目=场地费） SUM(IF(t.io_type = 2 AND t.trade_type = '经费' AND t.subject = '场地费', t.amount, 0)) AS siteFeeTotal, -- 实际总支出：仅会费支出，剔除场地费 SUM(IF(t.io_type = 2 AND NOT (t.trade_type = '经费' AND t.subject = '场地费'), t.amount, 0)) AS outTotal, -- 当年结余 = 总收入 - 不含场地费的总支出 SUM(IF(t.io_type = 1, t.amount, 0)) - SUM(IF(t.io_type = 2 AND NOT (t.trade_type = '经费' AND t.subject = '场地费'), t.amount, 0)) AS yearSurplus FROM tb_club t WHERE t.year = #{year} GROUP BY t.club_code ORDER BY t.club_code;
